hooks.command: $json = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $file = $json.tool_input.file_path; if ($file -notlike '*Seamless-Checklist-*' -or $file -like '*index.html') { exit 0 }; $indexPath = 'C:\Users\aliow\Seamless-Checklist-\index.html'; $content = Get-Content $indexPath -Raw -Encoding UTF8; if ($content -match 'v1\.0\.(\d+)\.(\d+)\.(\d+)') { $build = [int]$Matches[1] + 1; $mm = (Get-Date).ToString('MM'); $dd = (Get-Date).ToString('dd'); $newVer = "v1.0.$build.$mm.$dd"; $content = $content -replace 'v1\.0\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+', $newVer; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($indexPath, $content, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)); $out = [pscustomobject]@{ hookSpecificOutput = [pscustomobject]@{ hookEventName = 'PostToolUse'; additionalContext = "Version auto-bumped to $newVer in index.html — do not bump it again manually." } } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Write-Output $out }
